channel.title: britaindentetomlin TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from britaindentetomlin

item.title: Finally got around to spending my gift cards I got for Christmas💄😌 #momtok #sahm #fyp #singlemom #dayinmylife
item.description: Finally got around to spending my gift cards I got for Christmas💄😌 #momtok #sahm #fyp #singlemom #dayinmylife
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: Widows do not owe the world tears, darkness, or a timeline. What we wear and how we show up has nothing to do with how deeply we loved or how much we hurt. #momtok #sahm #fyp #grief #singlemom
item.description: Widows do not owe the world tears, darkness, or a timeline. What we wear and how we show up has nothing to do with how deeply we loved or how much we hurt. #momtok #sahm #fyp #grief #singlemom
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: I use volume spray and dry shampoo as needed❤️ this is the kitsch satin curling rod.
item.description: I use volume spray and dry shampoo as needed❤️ this is the kitsch satin curling rod.
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: How do yall feel about me cutting my hair? Someone mentioned it and now I’m curious, do you think I would look good with shoulder length hair? If you cut your hair when you had long hair, did you regret it? #momtok #sahm #heatlesscurls #singlemom #hairtok
item.description: How do yall feel about me cutting my hair? Someone mentioned it and now I’m curious, do you think I would look good with shoulder length hair? If you cut your hair when you had long hair, did you regret it? #momtok #sahm #heatlesscurls #singlemom #hairtok
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: I don’t think I’ll ever see a curling iron in my future😂 ##momtok##heatlesscurls##sahm##singlemom##hairtok
item.description: I don’t think I’ll ever see a curling iron in my future😂 ##momtok##heatlesscurls##sahm##singlemom##hairtok
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: Mom Cars are a different level of dirty😮‍💨 give it a week lol it’s gonna look the same again🤪 #momtok #sahm #singlemom #cleantok #fyp
item.description: Mom Cars are a different level of dirty😮‍💨 give it a week lol it’s gonna look the same again🤪 #momtok #sahm #singlemom #cleantok #fyp
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: I don’t know why but I just can’t get along with the Patrick ta blush🥲 what is your favorite blush from Sephora? #momtok #sahm #unboxingvideo
item.description: I don’t know why but I just can’t get along with the Patrick ta blush🥲 what is your favorite blush from Sephora? #momtok #sahm #unboxingvideo
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: Don’t worry, I fixed the back🫣 #heatlesscurls #momtok #sahm #fyp
item.description: Don’t worry, I fixed the back🫣 #heatlesscurls #momtok #sahm #fyp

item.title: I ended up returning my Patrick ta and getting Huda and rare beauty. #grwmroutine #momtok #sahm #fyp #skincare
item.description: I ended up returning my Patrick ta and getting Huda and rare beauty. #grwmroutine #momtok #sahm #fyp #skincare

item.title: We’ve been through a lot… but look at us. #momtok #singlemom

item.title: I’m exhausted today, but that didn’t stop me 💪 #momtok #fyp #sahm #singlemom

item.title: Nothing humbles you like refereeing a fart fight before coffee 🫠 #momtok #fyp #sahm #morningroutine
item.description: Nothing humbles you like refereeing a fart fight before coffee 🫠 #momtok #fyp #sahm #morningroutine
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: I am trying to maintain the weight I am at but grow/tone up my glutes and tighten my core. #whatieatinaday #momtok #fyp #sahm
item.description: I am trying to maintain the weight I am at but grow/tone up my glutes and tighten my core. #whatieatinaday #momtok #fyp #sahm
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: The first year felt like an accomplishment, the second year felt like acceptance, and the third year has felt like growth. We forever miss you, Jacob Wade Tomlin❤️ ##foryou##neverforgotten
item.description: The first year felt like an accomplishment, the second year felt like acceptance, and the third year has felt like growth. We forever miss you, Jacob Wade Tomlin❤️ ##foryou##neverforgotten
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: We were trying to go for a milk chocolate with warmth. For the color I used Wella •6N •7WG •7A ratio is 2 parts 6N : 2 parts 7WG : 1 part 7A🩷 #momtok #diy #hairtok #foryou
item.description: We were trying to go for a milk chocolate with warmth. For the color I used Wella •6N •7WG •7A ratio is 2 parts 6N : 2 parts 7WG : 1 part 7A🩷 #momtok #diy #hairtok #foryou
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: I’ve only been to the hair salon twice in the past like six years, so I’ve actually been cutting my hair for way longer😅 #momtok #diy #foryou #haircut #hairtok
item.description: I’ve only been to the hair salon twice in the past like six years, so I’ve actually been cutting my hair for way longer😅 #momtok #diy #foryou #haircut #hairtok

item.title: I can’t wait to do my second session!! I may go deeper this time😮‍💨 #foryou #momtok #skincare

item.title: My favorite thing since sliced bread 😇 #momtok #heatlesscurls #foryou #hairtutorial
item.description: My favorite thing since sliced bread 😇 #momtok #heatlesscurls #foryou #hairtutorial
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: I got everything from the dollar store, I cut off the stems and made a bouquet and secured it with a clear hair tie. I wrapped her hair around the bouquet and used lots of bobby pins. For Walker‘s hair, I made a nest with hot glue and put a piece of cardb
item.description: I got everything from the dollar store, I cut off the stems and made a bouquet and secured it with a clear hair tie. I wrapped her hair around the bouquet and used lots of bobby pins. For Walker‘s hair, I made a nest with hot glue and put a piece of cardb
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: My little sister is staying with me for a little while to see if we can help her get a job out here and start a new life❤️ so you may see more of her in my videos! #sahm #momtok #singlemom #diml #dayinmylife
item.description: My little sister is staying with me for a little while to see if we can help her get a job out here and start a new life❤️ so you may see more of her in my videos! #sahm #momtok #singlemom #diml #dayinmylife
item.author: britaindentetomlin

item.title: I Noticed results from the first session so I can’t WAIT to see how my skin improves over these next few🫶🏻 #sahm #momtok #skincare #diy #microneedling
